mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO qa_top_block
( date, top_block_code_set, top_etf_code_set, top_stock_code_set, block_avg_pct, etf_avg_pct, stock_avg_pct )
VALUES
( #{item.date}, #{item.topBlockCodeSet}, #{item.topEtfCodeSet}, #{item.topStockCodeSet}, #{item.blockAvgPct}, #{item.etfAvgPct}, #{item.stockAvgPct} )

update.if:
UPDATE qa_top_block
SET
date = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN COALESCE(#{item.date}, date)
ELSE date END,
top_block_code_set = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN COALESCE(#{item.topBlockCodeSet}, top_block_code_set)
ELSE top_block_code_set END,
top_etf_code_set = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN COALESCE(#{item.topEtfCodeSet}, top_etf_code_set)
ELSE top_etf_code_set END,
top_stock_code_set = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN COALESCE(#{item.topStockCodeSet}, top_stock_code_set)
ELSE top_stock_code_set END,
block_avg_pct = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN COALESCE(#{item.blockAvgPct}, block_avg_pct)
ELSE block_avg_pct END,
etf_avg_pct = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN COALESCE(#{item.etfAvgPct}, etf_avg_pct)
ELSE etf_avg_pct END,
stock_avg_pct = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN COALESCE(#{item.stockAvgPct}, stock_avg_pct)
ELSE stock_avg_pct END
WHERE id IN
#{item.id}

mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO qa_top_block
( date, top_block_code_set, top_etf_code_set, top_stock_code_set, block_avg_pct, etf_avg_pct, stock_avg_pct )
VALUES
( #{item.date}, #{item.topBlockCodeSet}, #{item.topEtfCodeSet}, #{item.topStockCodeSet}, #{item.blockAvgPct}, #{item.etfAvgPct}, #{item.stockAvgPct} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
date = COALESCE(VALUES(date), date), top_block_code_set = COALESCE(VALUES(top_block_code_set), top_block_code_set), top_etf_code_set = COALESCE(VALUES(top_etf_code_set), top_etf_code_set), top_stock_code_set = COALESCE(VALUES(top_stock_code_set), top_stock_code_set), block_avg_pct = COALESCE(VALUES(block_avg_pct), block_avg_pct), etf_avg_pct = COALESCE(VALUES(etf_avg_pct), etf_avg_pct), stock_avg_pct = COALESCE(VALUES(stock_avg_pct), stock_avg_pct)
